entities.name: ALR 2
entities.description: A Spanish peanut variety (Reg. no. CV-61, P1 599975) released in 1994 for cultivation in the Pollachi tract of Tamil Nadu

entities.name: ICGV 86011
entities.description: An advanced breeding line of peanut developed at the ICRISAT Asia Center

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The crop species Arachis hypogaea L. subsp. fastigiata Waldron var. vulgaris Hartz

entities.name: PURE-LINE SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to derive ALR 2 from the breeding line ICGV 86011

entities.name: YIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Evaluation tests conducted from 1986 to 1993 in Tamil Nadu to assess the performance of the peanut lines

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The Chitrai season characterized by April sowing and no irrigation

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The Margazhi season characterized by October sowing and irrigation

entities.name: SUMMER SEASON
entities.description: The Adi season characterized by June sowing and irrigation

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The research facility in Patancheru, India, where the breeding line ICGV 86011 was developed

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The location in Andhra Pradesh, India, where the ICRISAT Asia Center is situated

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the peanut breeding and testing took place

entities.name: ALIYARNAGAR RESEARCH STATION
entities.description: The agricultural research facility in Tamil Nadu where the ICGV 86011 population was supplied

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: The Indian state where yield trials were conducted and ALR 2 was released for cultivation

entities.name: TAMIL NADU AGRICULTURAL UNIVERSITY
entities.description: The institution in Coimbatore that released the ALR 2 variety

entities.name: COIMBATORE
entities.description: The city in Tamil Nadu where the Tamil Nadu Agricultural University is located

entities.name: POLLACHI TRACT
entities.description: The specific geographical area in Tamil Nadu recommended for the cultivation of ALR 2
